model._note_case: MultiCylinder: periodic domain, phase-conditioned query, 4 flow fields.
model._note_field_dim: 4 means u,v,p,omega. If targets include extra channels, shape_mismatch will flag it.
model._note_layout: Normalized periodic units. module_radius sets near-module geometry scale.
model._note_env_tokens: Centered periodic grid. Test 12x6,16x6,24x8 for wake resolution.
model._note_geometry_time: periodic wraps x/y; phase uses tau-style sin/cos query features.
model._note_decoder_mode: Start hyper_only. current_like approximates old shortcut-heavy behavior.
model._note_hyper_geometry_bias: Query-to-hyperedge coordinate bias with periodic directed x.
model._note_auxiliary_paths: A_me shapes organizer; direct/near/global reveal redundant wake shortcuts.
model._note_direct_residual_gate_init: 0 keeps direct shortcut nearly off; raise only for direct-residual ablations.

data._note_paths: Reads existing demo datasets in place; missing files fall back to synthetic smoke data.

training._note_training: Use --inspect-data and dry-run before real ablations.
